certifications-info.title: Meta Front-End Developer
certifications-info.description: A comprehensive 9-course professional specialization engineered by Meta experts to build job-ready frontend software engineering skills. Covers everything from core semantic markup and UI/UX architecture to professional React frameworks and technical interview preparation.

certifications-info.title: Introduction to Artificial Intelligence (AI)
certifications-info.description: An introductory course authorized by IBM and delivered via Coursera, covering core artificial intelligence concepts, machine learning workflows, deep learning applications, neural networks, and the ethical considerations surrounding AI deployment.

certifications-info.title: AI and Career Empowerment
certifications-info.issuer: University of Maryland Robert H. Smith School of Business
certifications-info.description: A non-credit course focused on leveraging artificial intelligence for career growth and professional success. Covers practical AI applications, productivity enhancement, responsible AI usage, and strategies for adapting to the evolving technology-driven workplace.

certifications-info.title: React and Redux Certification Test - Youtube Course
certifications-info.description: A specialization certificate confirming execution and application of frontend architectural patterns. Focuses on component lifecycle models, state orchestration with Context API, advanced global store management with Redux, and modern declarative rendering techniques.

certifications-info.title: JavaScript (Intermediate)
certifications-info.description: A skill certification verifying intermediate-level proficiency in JavaScript. Validates deep understanding of topics such as design patterns, memory management, concurrency model, data structures, and advanced asynchronous workflows.

certifications-info.title: C++ Essentials 1
certifications-info.issuer: Cisco Networking Academy / OpenedG Open Education & Development Group
certifications-info.description: Covers the fundamentals of C++ programming, focusing on basic data types, control flow structures, functions, and introductory object-oriented concepts. It prepares learners to understand core development logic and computer programming architectures.

certifications-info.title: Python (Basic)
certifications-info.description: A skill certification validating a foundational understanding of Python programming concepts. Tests core technical mechanics including basic data types, control flow structures, functional patterns, object principles, and fundamental standard library methods.

certifications-info.title: Web Fundamentals Learning Path
certifications-info.description: A focused technical track analyzing vulnerabilities inherent to web applications and application layers. Covers core OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities, server-side request manipulation, cross-site scripting workflows, and database injection architectures.

certifications-info.title: Vulnerability Management
certifications-info.description: Focuses on the lifecycle of discovering, analyzing, prioritizing, and mitigating configuration defects and asset exposures within modern enterprises. Includes infrastructure scanning models, risk scoring matrices, and structured patch management architectures.

certifications-info.title: Official ISC2 CC Online Self-Paced Training - 1M
certifications-info.description: Official foundational training program covering the core domains required for entry-level cybersecurity professionals. Focuses on security principles, business continuity, disaster recovery, access control, network security, and security operations.

certifications-info.title: Threat Hunting Fundamentals
certifications-info.description: Provides a comprehensive look into proactively identifying and isolating advanced persistent threats that elude traditional security solutions. Teaches analysis frameworks, event logging systems, behavioral monitoring metrics, and defensive network posture adjustments.

certifications-info.title: Ethical Hacking Essentials (EHE)
certifications-info.description: An foundational cybersecurity program designed by EC-Council introduces core concepts of information security and ethical hacking. The curriculum emphasizes fundamental threats, system vulnerabilities, and baseline defensive security measures.

certifications-info.title: Red Teaming Learning Path
certifications-info.description: An advanced technical track focused on offensive operations and adversary simulation architectures. Covers evasion tactics, active directory structures, post-exploitation controls, and custom payload deployment.

certifications-info.title: Jr Penetration Tester Learning Path
certifications-info.description: A technical learning path assessing real-world offensive security capabilities. Validates core competencies across security methodologies, network scanning frameworks, web application vulnerabilities, active privilege escalation, and custom payload execution.

certifications-info.title: Offensive Pentesting Learning Path
certifications-info.description: A rigorous offensive path focused on complex system exploitation and real-world compromise scenarios. Emphasizes advanced buffer overflows, active privilege escalation, network scanning matrices, and structured exploitation strategies.

certifications-info.title: CompTIA Pentest+ Learning Path
certifications-info.description: An intermediate capabilities path mapping closely to CompTIA PenTest+ objective domains. Covers advanced vulnerability management, infrastructure exploitation vectors, code analysis audits, and defensive remediation reports.

certifications-info.title: Ethical Hacking and Penetration Testing
certifications-info.description: A comprehensive introductory practical course outlining the fundamentals of penetration testing methodologies. It covers network scanning, vulnerability assessment, system exploitation techniques, and standard ethical hacking practices.

certifications-info.title: Complete Beginner Learning Path
certifications-info.description: A fundamental learning framework providing hands-on entry into security concepts. Guides students through basic Linux/Windows shell environments, operational networking setups, introductory web security vectors, and core foundational hacking techniques.
